4454 Rancho Pkwy, Arroyo Grande, CA 93420, USA
Natal plums close to ground. When ripe they are bright red. The fruit can be eaten out of hand or made into pies, jams, jellies, and sauces Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
